jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Emami - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Emami has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Emami:
Emami is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emami!
